description:
Roads cost 3 Move Points instead of 5.



Units gain Fast Embark and while embarked they gain Very Fast Movement on the World Map.
name: Advanced Logistics

description: <hyperlink>Special Province Improvements</hyperlink> grant +5 <gold></gold> <hyperlink>Gold</hyperlink>.
name: Specialist Districts

description:
Completing a Province Annexation, summons different Unit tier III-V Animal Unit under your control, depending on the annexed province type. To summon on Water, the SEAFARING should be unlocked.

The chances are:65% - to summon Tier II-IIIAnimal.33% - to summon Tier IV Animal.2% - to summon Tier V Animal.
name: Wild Expansion

description:
Founding or Absorbing Cities takes -2 turns.

Newly Founded or Absorbed Cities gain +1 Population.
name: Fruitful Integration

description:
Increase the City Cap by +1.Repeatable.

Each use, cost increases by 250 Imperium.
name: Expanded Governance

description: Unlocks the ability for <hyperlink>Units</hyperlink> to <hyperlink.GLOBAL.ExcavationConcept>Excavate</hyperlink> <hyperlink>Earthen</hyperlink> terrain in the <hyperlink>Underground</hyperlink>.
name: Excavation

description:
Unit can build roads on the World Map. Most terrain costs 6-8 Move Points while roads cost 5.



Road Building can be enabled in the Army panel. Roads are built on hexes along which the Army moves and cost 3 Gold per hex.
name: Road Building

description: Unlocks the ability for <hyperlink>Units</hyperlink> to embark and use vessels to cross the water, and for Flying and Floating units to travel over water.
name: Basic Seafaring

description: Gain <gold></gold> <hyperlink>Gold</hyperlink> per Rank of <hyperlink>Unit</hyperlink> and Level of <hyperlink>Hero</hyperlink> defeated in <hyperlink>Combat</hyperlink>:<bulletlist><bullet><hyperlink>Unit tier</hyperlink> I grant +5 <gold></gold> <hyperlink>Gold</hyperlink></bullet><bullet><hyperlink>Unit tier</hyperlink> II grant +10 <gold></gold> <hyperlink>Gold</hyperlink></bullet><bullet><hyperlink>Unit tier</hyperlink> III grant +15 <gold></gold> <hyperlink>Gold</hyperlink></bullet><bullet><hyperlink>Unit tier</hyperlink> IV grant +20 <gold></gold> <hyperlink>Gold</hyperlink></bullet><bullet><hyperlink>Unit tier</hyperlink> V grant +25 <gold></gold> <hyperlink>Gold</hyperlink></bullet><bullet><hyperlink>Hero</hyperlink> grant +20 <gold></gold> <hyperlink>Gold</hyperlink> per Level</bullet></bulletlist>
name: Battlefield Looting

description: Defeating an Infestation grants you a unit based on the Infestation defeated. Doesn't work on Fractured Infestations.
name: Call of Chaos

description: Gain +10<caststrategic></caststrategic><casttactical></casttactical> Casting Points.
name: Wizard King

description:
Your units gain +20 Morale at the start of any Combat where their side is defending.

Your Cities suffer no economic penalties while under Siege.
name: Indomitable Defenders

description: Gain <knowledge></knowledge> <hyperlink>Knowledge</hyperlink> whenever your <hyperlink>Units</hyperlink> gain Ranks:<bulletlist><bullet>Soldier grant 5 <knowledge></knowledge> <hyperlink>Knowledge</hyperlink>.</bullet><bullet>Veteran grant 10 <knowledge></knowledge> <hyperlink>Knowledge</hyperlink>.</bullet><bullet>Elite grant 15 <knowledge></knowledge> <hyperlink>Knowledge</hyperlink>.</bullet><bullet>Champion grant 20 <knowledge></knowledge> <hyperlink>Knowledge</hyperlink>.</bullet><bullet>Legend grant 25 <knowledge></knowledge> <hyperlink>Knowledge</hyperlink>.</bullet></bulletlist>
name: Philosopher Soldiers

description: Gain +1 <whisperingStone></whisperingStone> <hyperlink>Whispering Stone</hyperlink>.
name: Diplomatic Focus

description:
Vassals gain +1 Allegiance Levels when first Vassalized.

Converting conquered Cities into Vassals takes -1 Turn.
name: Benevolent Conquerors

description:
Each city in your Empire loses -1 Population, but immediately summons 4 Unit tier I Unit.Repeatable.

Each use, cost increases by 250 Imperium.
name: Rite of the Last Stand

description:
Immediately reveal the full World Map.

Your Throne City gains infinite Sensing Range.

Armies in Sensing Range reveal their numbers and allegiance.
name: Spying Shadows

description: Your <hyperlink>Armies</hyperlink> <hyperlink>regenerate</hyperlink> +10 <hyperlink><hp></hp> Hit Points</hyperlink> per <turn></turn> <hyperlink>Turn</hyperlink>
name: Dark Vigor

description: <bulletlist><bullet>Your <hyperlink>Units</hyperlink> gain Universal Camouflage in all <hyperlink>Domains</hyperlink>.</bullet><bullet>Your <hyperlink>Cities</hyperlink> gain:<bulletlist></bullet><bullet>+4 <hyperlink>Vision Range</hyperlink></bullet><bullet>+4 <hyperlink>Sensing Range</hyperlink>.</bullet></bulletlist></bulletlist>
name: Shadow Domain

description: Gain +5 <optactical></optactical> <hyperlink> Combat Casting Point</hyperlink> per unit death or kill in <hyperlink>Combat</hyperlink>.
name: Death Magic

description: <bulletlist><bullet>Raizing <hyperlink>City</hyperlink> takes -2 <turn></turn> <hyperlink>Turns</hyperlink> less (minimum 2 <turn></turn> <hyperlink>Turns</hyperlink>).</bullet><bullet>Raizing <hyperlink>Cities</hyperlink> additionally yields 50 <gold></gold> <hyperlink>Gold</hyperlink> per <population></population> <hyperlink>Population</hyperlink> in razed city.</bullet><bullet>Gain 3 random <hyperlink>Units</hyperlink> of <hyperlink>Unit tier</hyperlink> III of the razed city's culture.</bullet></bulletlist>
name: Reign of Destruction

description: When you win in battle, you have a 20% chance of gaining a <hyperlink>Unit tier</hyperlink> II or III <hyperlink>Unit</hyperlink> that can be produced in a closest <hyperlink>City</hyperlink>.
name: Lure of the Horde

description: Your <hyperlink>Units</hyperlink> and <hyperlink>Cities</hyperlink> gain +4 <hyperlink>Vision Range</hyperlink> and +6 <hyperlink>Sensing Range</hyperlink>.
name: Advanced Sensing

description: Unlocks the ability for your <hyperlink>Armies</hyperlink> to use <hyperlink>Forced March</hyperlink>.
name: Forced March

description:
Cities can now build Teleporters.



Outposts can build teleporters in a province they annex through a Work Camp.
name: Teleporter Infrastructure

description:
All your Heroes instantly gain +1 Level.Repeatable.

Each use, cost increases by 250 Imperium.
name: Rite of the Exalted

description:
Gain the Cryptblade hero item.Repeatable.

Each use, cost increases by 250 Imperium.
name: Rite of the Cryptblade

description:
Immediately conjure a defended Magic Material near each City in your Empire.Repeatable.

Each use, cost increases by 250 Imperium.
name: Rite of Conjuration

description:
All currently active Units permanently gain +1 Defense and +1 Resistance.Repeatable.

Each use, cost increases by 250 Imperium.
name: Rite of the Dreadnought

description:
All your Units instantly regain 10% Hit Points and non-Hero Units gain +1 Rank. You can gain Exalted Ranks with this Rite.Repeatable.

Each use, cost increases by 250 Imperium.
name: Rite of Enduring Duty

description:
Call a Rally of the Lieges event, where you may recruit Units with 25% discount.Gain +5 Recruitment Points.Repeatable.

Each use, cost increases by 250 Imperium.
name: Rite of the Banners

description: Gain +1 <hyperlink>Siege Project</hyperlink> slot.
name: Siege Specialization

description: The movement cost of embarking is reduced while Embarked <hyperlink>Units</hyperlink> gain Very Fast Movement.
name: Advanced Seafaring

description:
Your Cities gain +500 Draft this Turn.Repeatable.

Each use, cost increases by 250 Imperium.
name: Rite of Chosen Warriors

description:
Your Throne City loses -1 Population but immediately summons a Balor with Power from Slaughter pasive ability.Repeatable.

Each use, cost increases by 250 Imperium.
name: Rite of Possession

description:
Immediately summon a strong Army of Magic Origin Units at your Throne City.Repeatable.

Each use, cost increases by 250 Imperium.
name: Rite of the Astral Summons

description:
Gain the Breastplate of the Champion hero item.Repeatable.

Each use, cost increases by 250 Imperium.
name: Rite of the Armorer

description:
Instantly gain 10 Knowledge for each Province in your Empire's Domain.Repeatable.

Each use, cost increases by 250 Imperium.
name: Rite of Awakening

description:
Instantly Gain +750 Knowledge.Repeatable.

Each use, cost increases by 250 Imperium.
name: Rite of Forbidden Knowledge

description: Your Vassals grant +25% more resources in tribute.
name: Master of Houses

description:
Recruiting Units during the Rally of the Lieges costs -50% Gold.

Time between Rallies of the Lieges is reduced by -5 Turns.
name: House Levies

description: Your <hyperlink>Heroes</hyperlink> gain <hyperlink><xp></xp> Experience</hyperlink> 100% faster.
name: Exalted by Shadows

description:
Gain the ability to assign Whispering Stones to other empires' Vassals to gain their tribute.

Gain +1 Whispering Stone.
name: Court of Whispers

description: Gain +200 <mana></mana> <hyperlink>Mana</hyperlink> and +200 <knowledge></knowledge> <hyperlink>Knowledge</hyperlink> upon completing conquest of a city.
name: Stolen Power

description: -10% to all of <hyperlink>Unit Upkeep</hyperlink> for Magic Origin <hyperlink>Units</hyperlink>.
name: Shadow Binding

description:
Free Cities with a Whispering Stone assigned instantly provide you with Vision Range.

Free Cities or Vassals with a Whispering Stone assigned grant you +15 Knowledge.
name: All-Seeing

description:
Instantly gain +10 Whispering Stone Strength with all Free City.Repeatable.

Each use, cost increases by 250 Imperium.
name: Rite of Allegiance

description:
Instantly summon strong bandit Army under your control to your Throne City.Repeatable.

Each use, cost increases by 250 Imperium.
name: Rite of War

description:
Instantly gain +1000 Mana.Repeatable.

Each use, cost increases by 250 Imperium.
name: Rite of Astral Abundance

description:
Instantly gain +2000 Gold.Repeatable.

Each use, cost increases by 250 Imperium.
name: Rite of Wealth

description:
Immediately summon a Spirit Wolf with Guardian Spirit and Resurgence pasives. at your Throne City.Repeatable.

Each use, cost increases by 250 Imperium.
name: Rite of the Guardian Spirit

description:
Each City in your Empire instantly gain +1 Population.Repeatable.

Each use, cost increases by 250 Imperium.
name: Rite of Expansive Growth

description: Units of Legendary Rank gain a buff depending on their unit type.<bulletlist><bullet>Shield Units gain Order of the Unbreakable.</bullet><bullet>Polearm Units gain Order of the Tyrantslayer.</bullet><bullet>Shock Units gain Order of the Thunderer.</bullet><bullet>Skirmisher Units gain Order of the Windborne.</bullet><bullet>Support Units gain Order of the Soulwarden.</bullet><bullet>Battle Mage Units gain Order of the Warmage.</bullet><bullet>Ranged Units gain Order of the Titanslayer.</bullet><bullet>Fighter Units and Magic Fighter Units gain Order of the Berserker.</bullet><bullet>Mythic Units gain Order of the Indomitable.</bullet></bulletlist>
name: Knightly Orders

description: Shock Units, Shield Units, and Polearm Units gain 10 <hyperlink><xp></xp> Experience</hyperlink> per <turn></turn> Turn.
name: Career Soldiers

description: Vassals grant:<bulletlist><bullet>+20 <gold></gold> <hyperlink>Gold</hyperlink> income.</bullet><bullet>+10 <knowledge></knowledge> <hyperlink>Knowledge</hyperlink> income.</bullet></bulletlist>
name: Tributaries

description:
Destroying an Infestation grants:+200 Empire Relations to all other Free Cities for 10 Turns.+2 Alignment per each Free City on the map.

Conquering a Free City grants:+200 Empire Relations to all other Free Cities for 10 Turns.-2 Alignment per each Free City on the map.
name: Pacification

description: Your <hyperlink>Units</hyperlink> <hyperlink>regenerate</hyperlink> an additional +1 <hyperlink><hp></hp> Hit Point</hyperlink> per 2 <movementgeneral></movementgeneral> <hyperlink>Move Points</hyperlink> they have remaining at the end of your <turn></turn> <hyperlink>Turn</hyperlink>.
name: Resourceful Vigor

description: <mine></mine> <hyperlink>Mines</hyperlink> grant:<bulletlist><bullet>+3 <gold></gold> <hyperlink>Gold</hyperlink>.</bullet><bullet>+2 <knowledge></knowledge> <hyperlink>Knowledge</hyperlink>.</bullet>
name: Arcane Artisans

description: <hyperlink>Special Province Improvements</hyperlink> cost -50% <structureprod></structureprod> <hyperlink>Production</hyperlink> and -50% <gold></gold> <hyperlink>Gold</hyperlink> to build.
name: Provincial Architects

description: Your <hyperlink>Throne City</hyperlink>, and <hyperlink>Cities</hyperlink> that share a border with the Throne City, gain +5% in all types of income.
name: Metropolitan Society

description: <bulletlist><bullet>Gain +2 <hyperlink>Siege Projects</hyperlink>.</bullet><bullet><hyperlink>Siege Projects</hyperlink> cost -50% less.</bullet>
name: Siege Masters

description: Province Improvements grant +2 <happiness></happiness> <hyperlink>City Stability</hyperlink> for each adjacent Province Improvement of the same type.
name: Consolidated Industry

description:
Outposts cost -25% Gold less.

Founding and upgrading Outposts takes -1 Turn.
name: Military Engineering

description: Newly summoned or recruited Magic Origin <hyperlink>Units</hyperlink> gain +1 Ranks.
name: Astral Binding

description:
Units are restored to full Hit Points and regain 50% of their Move Points after using a Teleporter if they have not yet regained any Move Point this turn.

Teleporters grant +15 Mana income.
name: Teleportation Mastery

description: Casting a <hyperlink>Combat Spell</hyperlink> reduces the cost of all other <hyperlink>Combat Spell</hyperlink> types by -25% for 2 <turn></turn> <hyperlink>Turns</hyperlink>.
name: Surge Spellcasting

description: Your <hyperlink>Throne City</hyperlink> gains +10 <knowledge></knowledge> <hyperlink>Knowledge</hyperlink> for each <hyperlink>Magic Material</hyperlink> your Empire has access to.
name: Ingredient Experimentation

description:
Research Posts grant +5 Knowledge.

Conduits grant +5 Mana.
name: Focused Studies

description: Whenever a new <hyperlink>Research</hyperlink> Skill is researched, the <knowledge></knowledge> <hyperlink>Knowledge</hyperlink> cost of another random Skill is reduced by -25%.
name: Astral Inspiration

description: Gain <knowledge></knowledge> <hyperlink>Knowledge</hyperlink> per Rank of <hyperlink>Unit</hyperlink> and Level of <hyperlink>Hero</hyperlink> defeated in <hyperlink>Combat</hyperlink>:<bulletlist><bullet><hyperlink>Unit tier</hyperlink> I grant +1 <knowledge></knowledge> <hyperlink>Knowledge</hyperlink></bullet><bullet><hyperlink>Unit tier</hyperlink> II grant +2 <knowledge></knowledge> <hyperlink>Knowledge</hyperlink></bullet><bullet><hyperlink>Unit tier</hyperlink> III grant +3 <knowledge></knowledge> <hyperlink>Knowledge</hyperlink></bullet><bullet><hyperlink>Unit tier</hyperlink> IV grant +4 <knowledge></knowledge> <hyperlink>Knowledge</hyperlink></bullet><bullet><hyperlink>Unit tier</hyperlink> V grant +5 <knowledge></knowledge> <hyperlink>Knowledge</hyperlink></bullet><bullet><hyperlink>Hero</hyperlink> grant +10 <knowledge></knowledge> <hyperlink>Knowledge</hyperlink> per Level</bullet></bulletlist>
name: Knowledge Extraction

description: -15% to all of <hyperlink>Unit Upkeep</hyperlink> per Rank that <hyperlink>Unit</hyperlink> has.
name: Martial Ancestry

description: <hyperlink>City Structures</hyperlink> cost -20% less <gold></gold> <hyperlink>Gold</hyperlink> to build.
name: Master Masons

description: <hyperlink>Spells</hyperlink> can now be cast on the first <turn></turn> Turn of <hyperlink>Combat</hyperlink>.
name: Quickening

description: <teleporter></teleporter> <hyperlink>Teleporter</hyperlink> and <spelljammer></spelljammer> <hyperlink>Spell Jammer</hyperlink> <hyperlink>Province Improvements</hyperlink> grant +10 <mana></mana> <hyperlink>Mana</hyperlink> Income.
name: Mana Extraction

description:
Locking and Shuffling Research Skills costs -50% less.

Research City Structures cost -25% less Gold and Production to build.
name: Adaptive Research

description: Gain +40 more <casusBelli></casusBelli> <hyperlink>Grievance</hyperlink> against players with an opposing <hyperlink>Alignment</hyperlink>.
name: Justified Wars

description: <hyperlink>Units</hyperlink> recruited through <hyperlink>Rally of the Lieges</hyperlink> gain +2 Rank upon recruitment.
name: Exemplar

description: Gain +1 <whisperingStone></whisperingStone> <hyperlink>Whispering Stone</hyperlink>.
name: Diplomatic Channels

description: Your <hyperlink>Cities</hyperlink> grant:<bulletlist><bullet>+20% <food></food> <hyperlink>Food</hyperlink> income.</bullet><bullet>+20% <mana></mana> <hyperlink>Mana</hyperlink> income.</bullet><bullet>+20% <knowledge></knowledge> <hyperlink>Knowledge</hyperlink> income.</bullet></bulletlist>
name: Druidic Empire

description: Movement cost for friendly <hyperlink>Units</hyperlink> in your <hyperlink>Domain</hyperlink> is reduced by -3 .
name: Rangers

description: Each <hyperlink>Resource Node</hyperlink> in the City <hyperlink>Domains</hyperlink>, grant +10 <mana></mana> <hyperlink>Mana</hyperlink> income.
name: Druidic Care

description: <hyperlink>Cities</hyperlink> may expand to <hyperlink>Provinces</hyperlink> located +2 <hyperlink>Province</hyperlink> further from the center.
name: Expansive Reach

description:
Coast, River and Underground Lake Provinces grant:+5 Draft.+5 Food.

Rivers count as roads for the purposes of movement for your Units.
name: Expert Sailors

description: Provinces with the Forest <hyperlink>Province</hyperlink> Feature grant:<bulletlist><bullet>+2 <food></food> <hyperlink>Food</hyperlink></bullet><bullet>+2 <happiness></happiness> <hyperlink>City Stability</hyperlink></bullet></bulletlist>
name: Natural Order

description: Your units <hyperlink>regenerate</hyperlink> an additional +15 <hyperlink><hp></hp> Hit Points</hyperlink> per <turn></turn> <hyperlink>Turn</hyperlink> in friendly <hyperlink>Domain</hyperlink>.
name: Natural Recovery

description: <farm></farm> <hyperlink>Farms</hyperlink> grant +5 <food></food> <hyperlink>Food</hyperlink>.
name: Soiltenders

description: Razing <hyperlink>Cities</hyperlink> grant +50 <gold></gold> <hyperlink>Gold</hyperlink>, <mana></mana> <hyperlink>Mana</hyperlink>, <knowledge></knowledge> <hyperlink>Knowledge</hyperlink> income.</bulletlist>
name: Spoils of Destruction

description: <bulletlist><bullet>Gain +40 <casusBelli></casusBelli> <hyperlink>Grievance</hyperlink> against all other <hyperlink>Empires</hyperlink>. These cannot be traded or lost.</bullet><bullet>Gain +25 <influence></influence> <hyperlink>Imperium</hyperlink> per active <rs_war></rs_war> <hyperlink>War</hyperlink> you are involved in.</bullet></bulletlist>
name: Destined Conquerors

description: <hyperlink>Razing</hyperlink> <hyperlink>Cities</hyperlink> grants +1 <population></population> <hyperlink>Population</hyperlink> to one of your <hyperlink>Cities</hyperlink> for every 3 <population></population> <hyperlink>Population</hyperlink> of the city that was razed.
name: War Slaves

description: <hyperlink>Forced March</hyperlink> costs -75% less <mana></mana> <hyperlink>Mana</hyperlink> and inflicts -75% less damage to your <hyperlink>Units</hyperlink>.
name: Tireless Marchers

description: Your racial non-Magic Origin non-<hyperlink>Heroes</hyperlink> <hyperlink>Units</hyperlink> gain combat <hyperlink><xp></xp> Experience</hyperlink> +25% faster.
name: Impressment

description:
Pillaging a Province takes -1 turns and yields +20% more rewards.

Pillaging Units are healed for +20 Hit Points.
name: Skilled Raiders

description: Gain +20<optactical></optactical> <hyperlink> Combat Casting Points</hyperlink> and <caststrategic></caststrategic> <hyperlink>World Map Casting Points</hyperlink>.
name: Casting Reserves
